productDisplayName: Puma Men's Neon Cat Black Flip Flop
description: This absolutely stylish pair of Neon flip flops from puma makes for fantastic casual wear. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the minimalist design of the cat adds a classy look. The stitch detailing coupled with a velvety inner along the synthetic straps is a perfect combination of comfort and style. The TPR outsole with circular grooves ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it great beachwear and pool side slipper.UpperFabric upper offer dry comfort to the feetThong straps with stitch detailing and padded innerThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfortNeon Cat logo on the footbedOutsoleTPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
